tts_lines.label: NightAmbience
tts_lines.text: The valley breathes at night... Stay close to the fire — not for warmth, but for the light. Darkness belongs to them, not to us.

tts_lines.label: CraftingWisdom
tts_lines.text: Stone axe, bone needle, fire striker — these are not tools. These are the distance between you and death.

tts_lines.label: TRexWarning
tts_lines.text: The T-Rex does not hunt by sight alone. It reads the air — your sweat, your fear, the blood on your hands from yesterday's kill. Stand downwind. Stay still. Breathe shallow.

tts_lines.label: ForestHeartbeat
tts_lines.text: The forest has its own heartbeat. Listen — insects at dusk, silence before the storm, the distant call of something large moving through the canopy. When the birds stop singing, something is coming. That silence is your warning.
tts_lines.gameplay_function: Teaches player to read ambient audio silence as danger signal — birds/insects stop when predator is near

tts_lines.label: RaptorFlee
tts_lines.text: Move. Now. Do not stop, do not look back. The Raptors are behind us — three of them, maybe four. Head for the river. They hate water. Go!
tts_lines.gameplay_function: Urgent raptor flee event — teaches river water mechanic for scent masking

ambient_audio_zones.label: AudioSource_Campfire_Hub_001
ambient_audio_zones.notes: Primary campfire at hub — crackling fire with distant birds. Loops continuously.

ambient_audio_zones.label: AudioZone_ForestAmbient_North_001
ambient_audio_zones.notes: Dense forest ambient — birds, insects, rustling leaves. North perimeter of hub clearing.

ambient_audio_zones.label: AudioSource_TrikeHerd_001
ambient_audio_zones.freesound_name: Procedural low-frequency rumble (no direct match found)
ambient_audio_zones.notes: Triceratops herd presence — low rumble, heavy breathing, occasional snort. Requires custom synthesis or licensed SFX.

ambient_audio_zones.label: AudioZone_ForestAmbient_South_001
ambient_audio_zones.notes: South perimeter ambient — night layer with insects and cicadas. Active during dusk/night cycle.

audio_design_notes.silence_as_warning: When predator is within 500u of player, suppress all ambient audio (birds, insects). This teaches the player that silence = danger without explicit UI.
audio_design_notes.campfire_safety_radius: Within 600u of Prop_Campfire_Hub_001, increase music warmth layer. Outside = tension layer.
audio_design_notes.trike_herd_low_freq: Triceratops herd should emit 40-80Hz sub-bass rumble detectable via controller haptics. Intensity scales with proximity to Trike_Hub_001/002/003.
audio_design_notes.day_night_audio_layers: Day: birds dominant, insects background. Dusk: insects rise, birds fade. Night: cicadas, frogs, distant predator calls. Dawn: birds return, tension resolves.

vfx_requests.vfx: Niagara fire particle system — small campfire scale, embers rising, smoke column
Ambient dust motes + light shaft particles through canopy
Breath condensation particle on cold morning, subtle dust from movement

screen_effects.vfx: Screen edge vignette pulse (red tint) + camera micro-shake
Desaturation pulse on ambient — world goes slightly grey as birds stop

missing: Triceratops herd low-frequency SFX (no Freesound match)
